text:
Leon Eckert
Leon Eckert is Associate Area Head of Interactive Media Arts (IMA) and an Assistant Arts Professor of IMA at NYU Shanghai. He is an artist and educator, interested in the social and cultural changes produced by digital media technologies and the political and economic forces that drive their development. His work uses network and web technologies as well as photo and video.
Education
MPS, Interactive Telecommunications ProgramNew York University
BA, Design Goldsmiths, University of London

The Internet, Data and Society
